summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of SmartPaymentTerminals page at /smart-payment-terminals. All 26 tests passed covering: page load, SEO elements (title, meta, 4 JSON-LD schemas), breadcrumb navigation, H1 content, hero section with 2 CTA buttons and image, terminal cards (Sunmi V3, Sunmi V2, Verifone Victa, Verifone V Series), 6 stat cards, 6 benefit cards, 9 payment methods, 4 industry cards with links, 6 MSC services, 3 FAQ accordions, CTA section, 8 internal links, lead form modal open/close, navigation menu integration, footer link, URL redirect from /pos/smart-terminals, and no console errors.

passed: 1. Page loads at /smart-payment-terminals without errors
2. Page title contains 'Smart Payment Terminals | Sunmi V3, Verifone Victa'
3. Breadcrumb shows Home > Hardware > Smart Payment Terminals
4. H1 contains 'Smart Payment Terminals for Modern Businesses'
5. Hero section has two CTA buttons (Request Terminal Pricing, Schedule a Demo)
6. Hero image loads with correct alt text about Sunmi V3 and Verifone Victa
7. What Are Smart Payment Terminals section renders with 6 stat cards
8. Sunmi V3 Smart Terminal card renders with features and ideal-for tags
9. Sunmi V2 Smart POS card renders with capabilities and popular-for tags
10. Verifone Victa Series card renders with features and supports tags
11. Verifone V Series card renders with terminal features
12. Benefits section shows 6 benefit cards (Mobility, Faster Transactions, Contactless Payments, Integrated Business Tools, App Ecosystems, Secure Processing)
13. Payment Methods section lists 9 payment methods (Visa, Mastercard, Discover, American Express, Debit cards, Mobile wallets, NFC tap-to-pay, QR code payments, Digital receipts)
14. Industries section shows 4 industry cards with links (Restaurants, Retail Stores, Service Businesses, Events & Mobile)
15. Why MSC section lists 6 services
16. FAQ section has 3 questions that expand/collapse
17. CTA section has heading 'Upgrade to Smart Payment Technology'
18. Internal links section shows 8 related page links
19. Lead form modal opens from CTA buttons
20. Lead form modal closes with X button
21. 4 JSON-LD schemas present (Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Organization)
22. Navigation menu shows 'Smart Payment Terminals' under POS & Hardware > Payment Terminals
23. No console errors on page load
24. Old URL /pos/smart-terminals redirects to /smart-payment-terminals
25. Page content loads correctly after redirect
26. Footer includes Smart Terminals link

critical_code_review_comments: SmartPaymentTerminals.jsx follows same quality standard as EcommercePayments.jsx
All 4 JSON-LD schemas properly implemented (Service, FAQPage, BreadcrumbList, Organization)
Proper use of data-testid attributes for all major sections and interactive elements
SEO meta tags including canonical URL, OG tags, and keywords are correctly set
Lead form modal uses iframe from api.leadconnectorhq.com for external form integration
Calendly widget loaded dynamically with useEffect for demo scheduling
Navigation.jsx updated with Smart Payment Terminals entry under Payment Terminals section
Footer.jsx includes Smart Terminals link pointing to /smart-payment-terminals
App.js has proper route setup with Navigate redirect from /pos/smart-terminals
seed_data_creation: N/A - Static content page with no database operations
context_for_next_testing_agent: SmartPaymentTerminals page fully implemented at /smart-payment-terminals. Page includes: Hero with gradient background and payment terminal image, What Are Smart Payment Terminals section with 6 stat cards, Sunmi section with V3 and V2 terminal cards, Verifone section with Victa and V Series cards (dark theme), Benefits section with 6 cards, Payment Methods with 9 types listed, Industries with 4 linked cards, Why MSC with 6 services, FAQ with 3 expandable questions, CTA with Request Pricing and Schedule Demo buttons, and 8 internal links. Lead form uses api.leadconnectorhq.com iframe, Calendly uses external widget. Old URL /pos/smart-terminals properly redirects. Navigation under POS & Hardware > Payment Terminals.
